_description: Per-paradigm calibration: gap = 公榜 Macro-F1 − 本地 OOF CV Macro-F1. Updated on every LB paste.

context-only._note: n=5: cycle1线上0.7108 / v2 0.6833 / F(5seed概率平均+cycle1阈值)0.7124=NEW SOTA / B(切片阈值)0.6930砸NA / C(rank平均)0.6413 BC崩。★三大铁律实测确认。cap1切片CV gap~0.07但'CV高分≠线上高分'

cloud-whisper-large-v3-vap._note: n=3: smoke 0.634(40通CV0.641,gap-0.008) / full-cycle1 0.671(全量CV0.652,gap+0.019) / full-balanced 0.644(BC阈值0.4,gap-0.008)。★关键发现：whisper端到端线上远低于纯context LGBM(0.671 vs 0.712=-0.041)。gap≈0=CV准但CV本身就低。whisper神经头(cap1切片CV训练)不如纯context LGBM

baseline-enhanced._note: 修 baseline 漏分点（阈值/ASL/音频保序列）

vap-stereo._note: 双声道 cross-attention 冻结编码器 VAP 式

ensemble._note: 多 paradigm rank 平均集成
